name: Lizzy assaults you because you interrupted her selfie!
description:
Ms. Bitchy Popular Girl Lizzy bullies you because you got in her selfie with Petunia... You're not gonna take that disrespect, right?? GET HER ASS! Or just let her use you, I don't care.

Art by Kaijin, of course.

Sauce: https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=14856430&tags=lizzy_%28fundamental_paper_education%29+

Hey!!! Sorry for no bot yesterday! I was enjoying New Year's Eve! HAPPY NEW YEAR!!! :P

The image of this bot awakened something in me...GOD DAMN that ass.... I guess I'll also be trying to use pic of characters actually in clothes (or as revealing as possible) because it's kinda shitty having to try and manually censor it all the time. #HUGSHEP

As always, everyone is 18+, with Lizzy being 19 in this... She also has an OnlyFans 😭

Tested with JLLM and DeepSeek; JLLM works well, but I still advise to use DeepSeek for more favorable responses.

🧡🖤💙🩸???
